title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Skill India Mission Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Skill India Mission Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Skill India Mission Partners family as a Curriculum Developer in Hyderabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Skill India Mission Partners:
Skill India Mission Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Skill India Mission Partners!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
